questions.question: What sport is being played on the marked surface?
required_visual_evidence: circular target with red center and white rings
questions.rationale: Identifies the sport and primary activity shown in all frames

questions.question: Describe the player's body position during the delivery in the first frame.
questions.answer_key: The player is in a low, extended sliding position with one leg stretched back
questions.rationale: Key curling technique visible; essential for understanding the sport's mechanics

questions.question: What color is the center of the target visible on the ice?
questions.rationale: Describes the curling house design and visual layout of the playing surface
